name: Erika Andiola, OurRevolution.com
subject: Stop Trump's deportation raids.
body:
Donald Trump's attack on immigrants has taken a frightening turn.
#
Sisters and Brothers -
Donald Trump's attack on immigrants has taken a frightening turn. I'm writing you from Phoenix, one of the dozens of cities under attack from Trump's gestapo-style raids targeting immigrant families.
Since Wednesday, Immigration and Customs Enforcement officers have detained and deported hundreds of undocumented Americans, including the parents of U.S. citizen children. There have even been reports of ICE agents following Latino children home from school in hopes of arresting undocumented parents and demanding documents from citizens and immigrants alike.
These raids targeting people based on where they live and the color of their skin have already happened at homes, stores and workplaces in California, Florida, Georgia, Illinois, Kansas, New York, North Carolina, Texas and Virginia. [**Will you help stop the attacks on immigrant families? Sign up now to let us know we can count on you to protect victims of ICE raids in your community.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0a37/43f17890/200590b9/62004277/2081992962/VEsH/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/stop-the-raids/?source=em170212-full")
Donald Trump claims that millions of "criminal" immigrants live among us -- but this is a lie, designed to give him cover for his racist plan. The immigrants Trump is targeting aren't "rapists" or "bringing drugs" \-- they are people like my friend Lupita, who was separated from her citizen children this week after living in Arizona for 20 years.
Families and communities across America are being torn apart by Trump's xenophobic raids. This is not who we are. The raids must stop.
I am a proud and unafraid Dreamer, an undocumented immigrant who came here as a child. Through my years working with the immigrant rights' community, I know first-hand that we build power through organizing. Through that power we have been able to reunite thousands of immigrant families. We have the power to stop these unjust deportations -- but we must act fast and take action locally.
If you marched for women's rights in January and let Donald Trump know that "immigrants are welcome here," your voice voice is needed once again. [**Demand decency and justice for the undocumented community. Sign up to if you 're willing to take action locally to protect immigrant families and stop the raids.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0a37/43f17890/200590b9/62004277/2081992962/VEsE/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/stop-the-raids/?source=em170212-full")
In solidarity,
Erika Andiola
Our Revolution
**[SIGN UP to stand with immigrant families in your community](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0a37/43f17890/200590b9/62004277/2081992962/VEsF/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/stop-the-raids/?source=em170212-full")**

_P.S.: Want to do more?[Please download and share this critical "know your rights" infographics from our friends at United We Dream.](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0a37/43f17890/200590b9/62004274/2081992962/VEsC/ "http://weareheretostay.org/resources/rights-immigrants-must-know-during-a-trump-presidency/?utm_source=ourrevolution&utm_campaign=ice&utm_medium=email")_

PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
603 2ND ST, NE
WASHINGTON, DC, 20002

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.
603 2nd St NE, Washington, DC 20002
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0a37/43f17890/200590b9/62004275/2081992962/VEsD/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/information-update?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123 "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0a37/43f17890/200590b9/62004272/2081992962/VEsA/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Help us continue transforming American politics and fighting for progressive candidates and causes by [contributing to Our Revolution here](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0a37/43f17890/200590b9/62004273/2081992962/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-footer-OR").

name: mindy@dscc.org
subject: Did you see this from Elizabeth Warren?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
If you saw Senator Elizabeth Warren's message, you know we're in this fight together.
---
[****](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dscc-ewarren?refcode=DPE-20170212-Myers-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Hi team, it's great to meet you.

If I've learned one thing from working for Elizabeth Warren, it's this: We never, ever back down from a tough fight.

Like Elizabeth says: "We can whimper, we can whine, or we can fight back." And I promise you: The Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee is going to fight back.

But none of us can fight back on our own - not Elizabeth, not our DSCC chair Chris Van Hollen, not me, not any of us. YOU are the heart of this team - and your support is how we'll win.

[**Will you show that you're in our corner, friend? Donate $1 towards the DSCC 's work to elect Senate Democrats in 2018 today.**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dscc-ewarren?refcode=DPE-20170212-Myers-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Thanks for all you do,

Mindy Myers,
DSCC Executive Director

\------------------
Forwarded message:
From: Elizabeth Warren
Date: Saturday, February 11, 2017
Subject: Hi team, meet Mindy.

Hi team, meet my boss Mindy.

(Yes, even United States Senators have bosses.)

Back in 2011, I had never run for office before -- not even student council. And a popular, handsome Republican with $10 million in the bank held the Senate seat I was considering running for in Massachusetts.

I needed help -- so I asked around, and everyone told me that I needed to talk to Mindy Myers. Mindy is from Pennsylvania -- her dad was a bus driver and her mom worked at Sears (like my mom!) -- and she's also one of the very best Democratic campaign managers in the country.

I convinced Mindy to move to Boston, run my campaign, and teach a first-time candidate how to fight and win. Mitch McConnell and the Republicans may try to keep me quiet, but I won't stop speaking out and fighting back. And a big part of the reason for that? Mindy.

**I 'm introducing you to Mindy Myers because I have terrific news: She's agreed to become the Executive Director of the Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee to help all of our 2018 Senate Democrats fight and win.**

[**Let 's give Mindy and our Senate Democrats the best possible start to fight for a Democratic Senate and stand up to Donald Trump in 2018. Donate now to the DSCC.**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dscc-ewarren?refcode=DPE-20170212-Myers-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

I'm not going to sugar coat it: 2018 is going to be a tough election for us. Democrats are defending 25 Senate seats in the midterm elections -- 10 of which are in states that Donald Trump won in 2016. Republicans have to defend only eight total -- and only one in a state that voted for Hillary Clinton.

The Republicans have money and power -- and a 2016 playbook full of nasty attacks that they'll use again to deepen their control of the Senate in 2018.

That's why I'm happy that Mindy's taking the helm of the DSCC. She's smart and steady -- and she knows what it's like to take on tough fights and stand up to the powerful interests. My campaign wasn't just some fluke.

In 2006, Mindy helped our friend and climate champion Sheldon Whitehouse beat Republican Lincoln Chafee. In 2008, she led then-Senator Barack Obama's win in New Hampshire in the general election. And in 2010, she helped Dick Blumenthal beat WWE wrestling mogul Linda McMahon despite being outspent by $42 million. You read that correctly: her candidate was outspent by _$42 million_ , and she still won! And now she's going to help Senator Chris Van Hollen as he heads up the DSCC in this all-important midterm election.

But I also know this: Mindy doesn't win tough fights like this alone. And as hard as we fight, neither can our Democratic Senators. It's going to take millions of people all across this country to fight back against Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, the billionaire Koch brothers, and all the powerful interests. Grassroots is how we won in 2012, and grassroots is how we'll win in 2018.

[**The DSCC is fighting hard to protect Senate Democrats and take back the majority -- but they need your help. Please donate now -- whatever you can afford -- to give Mindy and our Senate Democrats a fighting chance in 2018.**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dscc-ewarren?refcode=DPE-20170212-Myers-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ec8b/2b07114c/45654cd9/736abdca/659303604/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ec8b/2b07114c/45654cd9/736abdc5/659303604/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ec8b/2b07114c/45654cd9/736abdc4/659303604/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.
---

subject: 🚫 ADD YOUR NAME: Reject Andy Puzder 🚫
body:

name: Glenn Davis
subject: UPDATE
body:
Peter,
We hit the halfway point in session last week with
Crossover, and what a session it has been!

I continued moving forward tax reform measures including
one that would eliminate double taxation on Virginia businesses
when they sell services into other states. I also have
legislation moving forward that would create greater transparency
in our budget for the taxpayers, as well as allow Virginia
entrepreneurs to take advantage of the newly passed federal
legislation related to crowdfunding when starting and growing
their companies.

For me, it's all about making Virginia more competitive
and restoring us as the best state in the nation for business and
job growth!

Please check out my personal update below on the first
half of session. You can view it by clicking the link below and
watching my YouTube video.
http://email.vervemail.com/ct/50434603:6hMreSmyN:m:3:2633621487:28141BC1BC9776AC7ACC24F50D7F4541:r

Also, I went live last week with a Facebook Live Town
Hall to discuss the top issues facing Virginia. I'm thankful for
the participation of so many people and for all the questions
that were asked.

Tax reform, education, and my continued opposition to
Medicaid expansion were all discussed.

Click the link below to check out all my remarks on these
important issues.

Thank you for your time,

Delegate Glenn Davis

Authorized by DAVIS for LG

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system January 17, 2017.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://email.vervemail.com/p/i6hMreSmyN

Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out:
http://email.vervemail.com/p/o6hMreSmyN

To unsubscribe from future mailings, send an email to mailto:unsub-29791180224-echo7-E11A82F5376F7AA87C3798569528FC8A@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings
with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

name: Jeanie Forrester
subject: Right to work - It's time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Hampshire Republican State Committee
body:
| |
---
---
| Derek,
Passing **right to work** would mean _new jobs and a stronger economy for the Granite State_.
Unfortunately, despite the support of the Governor and the Republicans in the state Senate – not to mention widespread public support – right to work is in danger in the House.
Some House Republicans plan to vote against right to work. That’s a mistake – and it would only empower the Democrats and the big labor bosses.
**[I said as much on WMUR on Friday night.](http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=gT2AZ1ZnBy-2FrecDREa9-2BbR-2BncdYrjYGa-2BcdGvpvk-2BU22S4koZtKDprVH0X030TvIXnVIemBUQm-2B-2Bl9CqABeStzsW9QlHaMLaxovmjayUoQWabXlYk4YoGM2nrurGhb9m_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30Mdn-2FXJDQ7q1ua9lLZz37HWjrwK90-2FAlY5Rt0Z-2B-2FOfLVzSKZ3OQ-2FW8iXMrppsHKWNpncNhsuJrao10vimFnZlOrlDr1pNjDYZhNwgvWuk1gl-2F6JnzPeREzhmjCR6MOBxhQr5y6iJnRlScW6t05zBsP78qg7yuP-2F2ZE0ZXbISEHRZ8O7hgYPpdH5eqCSlFVRQwoSRwvjmqkcS9QRIMfH77M4gDN4NRnqVE8Y-2BtAeK1ouiOEMLxHsAoF0e-2BjQ06YJzH69277ffkDemz6yULi9WOaDA-3D-3D)**
I urge you **[to contact your Member of the House of Representatives today](http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=gT2AZ1ZnBy-2FrecDREa9-2BbT0pW52ma3LTMrghVm-2FI6cX1bp9qU9pVjepmJ5dpi-2F0mEYpVGHJxp14MkMYowmnILw-3D-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30Mdn-2FXJDQ7q1ua9lLZz37HWjrwK90-2FAlY5Rt0Z-2B-2FOfLVzSKZ3OQ-2FW8iXMrppsHKWNpncNhsuJrao10vimFnZlOrq8sPoMwF2lQk8pHGQ2l8TmZUlcGCwpRxHFWMtOA1rArPNfPX66tgKU5TQ-2F0bTsvL4OsnSI4vWxqt0WSMQoBpxTR6M90JcQ-2B-2B9OoQVhU-2Bs9GNvZgHd4Durm2ay9tGk9iSs4gzUyYdo-2BPf2UvYDlUMHrswmOfkzL3DZvJlgiRQI6TVGVBw4ayJChWdKDGXdLgDA-3D-3D)** – **_right now_** – and urge them to vote FOR right to work this week.

clean_body: | | | Derek, Passing right to work would mean new jobs and a stronger economy for the Granite State. Unfortunately, despite the support of the Governor and the Republicans in the state Senate – not to mention widespread public support – right to work is in danger in the House. Some House Republicans plan to vote against right to work. That’s a mistake – and it would only empower the Democrats and the big labor bosses. I urge you – right now – and urge them to vote FOR right to work this week. Many thanks for your help. | | Jeanie Forrester Chairman New Hampshire Republican State Committee | | | Paid for by the New Hampshire Republican State Committee Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee 10 Water Street, Concord, NH 03301 - Jeannie Forrester, Chairman www.nh.gop | This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com Republican Party of New Hampshire · 10 Water Street · Concord · New Hampshire · 03301 \--UNSUBSCRIBEALT--

name: Team Kaine
subject: Senator Fiorina?? (CNN)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
---
**BREAKING NEWS: Carly Fiorina looking at VA Senate run**
**[Chip in now to defeat Fiorina or anyone else the GOP throws at us>>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=gtvqZ6O9xDs10Wy1pF8I8P0RDj3FSzTY)**

Derek -- First it was Fox radio personality and Trump acolyte Laura Ingraham. **Now CNN reports that Carly Fiorina "is certainly looking at a run" for the Senate against Tim Kaine.**

If this sounds familiar, it's because Fiorina already ran for Senate once...** _in California_**. Then she ran for President in 2016. And now she wants to try again, this time in Virginia.

Here's the reality, though: No matter who Tim's eventual opponent is, it's going to be a tough race. That's because Republicans and their billionaire allies are all-in to grab Tim's seat and rack up a dreaded 60-seat Senate majority.

**We can 't let that happen. We have to fight tooth and nail, _every day_ to keep Tim in the Senate. [Will you help us do it by chipping in today?](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=qbasiG4m%2BBddMXwEupJsU%2BYZhn5RB%2Fdb)**

No one knows Virginia like Tim, because of his early days as a civil rights lawyer to his time on the Richmond City Council, to governor and now senator. We need Tim in the Senate, not a rubber stamp for the Trump agenda with no governing experience.

**[Let's make sure we can keep him fighting for us.](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=bMP86y7OT9W3P8sleG6OYuYZhn5RB%2Fdb)**

Thanks,

Team Kaine
| [**DONATE**](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=RcOFF59VNx8ymcxpmf%2FRX%2F0RDj3FSzTY)
---
| Paid for by Paid for by Kaine for Virginia

name: Democrats.org
subject: re: Michael Flynn and Russia
body:
Tell the GOP to demand an independent investigation into Trump's ties with Russia
---
**Add your name: tell the GOP to demand an independent investigation into Trump and his connections to Russia.

** **[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Investigate-Trump-and-Russia1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170213_ew_nd&source=em_20170213_ew_nd")**
Friend --

Over the weekend, some big news broke about Trump's National Security Advisor, Michael Flynn. According to reports, Flynn had been having conversations with the Russian government during the campaign while Russia was actively trying to help Trump win and was already discussing U.S. sanctions against Russia before Trump took office.

Not surprisingly, Trump administration officials including Vice President Mike Pence had repeatedly lied to the public about Flynn's contacts with Russia.

You don't need a degree in foreign relations to understand what's happening here. Trump's campaign coordinated with the Russian government, and after Trump won the election, Trump installed Putin allies like Michael Flynn and Rex Tillerson in his administration.

And by refusing to release his tax returns, Trump is hiding the true extent of his financial ties to Russia.

**[The American people deserve answers. That's why Congressional Democrats are calling for an independent review of this administration's connections to Russia.](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Investigate-Trump-and-Russia1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+The+American+people+deserve+answers+That&utm_campaign=em_20170213_ew_nd&source=em_20170213_ew_nd")**

But Paul Ryan and Mitch McConnell, along with the majority of Republicans in Congress, are refusing to investigate. As long as they can enact their radical agenda of giving your hard-earned tax dollars away to the rich and taking health care away from tens of millions, they're apparently willing to turn a blind eye to Trump's coordination with Russia.

**The only way we can know for sure that Trump and his team are putting America before Russia is to reveal how deep these connections go. Add your name to tell Republican leaders in Congress that you demand an independent investigation into the Trump administration's ties with Russia:**

**[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Investigate-Trump-and-Russia1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170213_ew_nd&source=em_20170213_ew_nd")**
Thanks,

Eric

Eric Walker
Deputy Communications Director
Democratic National Committee

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c6a4/4067b0a/2cda24bd0/7e7ad93c/2425173105/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170213_ew_nd&source=em_20170213_ew_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c6a4/4067b0a/2cda24bd0/7e7ad93d/2425173105/VEsD/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170213_ew_nd&source=em_20170213_ew_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c6a4/4067b0a/2cda24bd0/7e7ad93a/2425173105/VEsA/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170213_ew_nd&source=em_20170213_ew_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c6a4/4067b0a/2cda24bd0/7e7ad93b/2425173105/VEsB/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170213_ew_nd&source=em_20170213_ew_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.
